steps.title: Talk to Your International Student Office
steps.description: Schedule an appointment with your DSO (Designated School Official) to discuss your OPT plans and eligibility.
tips: Bring your questions and timeline
Confirm your F-1 status is valid
Ask about school-specific requirements

steps.title: Submit OPT Recommendation Request
steps.description: Request your DSO to recommend you for OPT in SEVIS. They'll update your I-20 with the OPT recommendation.
tips: Fill out any required school forms
Submit all requested documents
Keep copies of everything

steps.title: Receive Your OPT I-20
steps.description: Your DSO will issue a new I-20 with the OPT recommendation. This is crucial for your application!
tips: Check all information is correct
Note the date on page 1 - you have 30 days to file
Make several copies for your records

steps.timing: Within 30 days of receiving OPT I-20
steps.title: Prepare Your OPT Application (Form I-765)
steps.description: Gather all required documents and complete the Employment Authorization Document (EAD) application.
tips: Use Form I-765 (check for latest version)
Prepare passport-style photos (2)
Copy of all I-20s, passport, visa, I-94
Personal check or money order ($410 as of 2026)

steps.timing: No later than 30 days after OPT I-20 date
steps.title: Mail Your OPT Application to USCIS
steps.description: Send your complete application package to the correct USCIS lockbox address.
tips: Use certified mail with tracking
Double-check you have all documents
Keep copies of your entire application
Note the mailing date for your records

steps.title: Wait for Receipt Notice (I-797)
steps.description: USCIS will send you a receipt notice confirming they received your application.
tips: Update your address if you move
Save the receipt number for tracking
You can check status online with this number

steps.title: Receive Your EAD Card
steps.description: Your Employment Authorization Document (work permit) will arrive by mail!
tips: Don't start work until you receive your EAD
Check the validity dates on your card
Make copies and keep your EAD safe
You can start working the day you receive it!

steps.title: Report Your Employment
steps.description: Inform your DSO within 10 days of starting a job or changing employers through the SEVP Portal.
tips: Keep your SEVP Portal login accessible
Report employer name, address, start date
Update if you change jobs
Unemployment cannot exceed 90 days total
